creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #70)

2 of the servers you see are in the same VLAN; there's also no firewall filtering this kind of thing (not even scrubbing udp/123) for the other 2.

you can check the 'delay' column, but anyway ... 

% ping -c 10 10.0.5.3 | grep -B1 avg
10 packets transmitted, 10 packets received, 0.0% packet loss
round-trip min/avg/max/stddev = 0.183/0.402/1.267/0.309 ms

% ping -c 10 10.0.32.248 | grep -B1 avg
10 packets transmitted, 10 packets received, 0.0% packet loss
round-trip min/avg/max/stddev = 0.958/1.024/1.157/0.064 ms
